name: Stats Section
description: Bold metric numbers display for landing pages — performance stats, counts, achievements.

hero.description: Large animated stats in a full-width dramatic section.

slots.stats: 3-4 Statistic components with animate: true, large display values

auradecantism.notes: d-mesh background. Statistic values use d-gradient-text.

preset_notes.hero: Full d-mesh bg. Values use d-gradient-text with large display.
preset_notes.inline: No mesh bg. Compact layout with standard text.

preset_notes.hero: Full cc-grid bg. Values use cc-data.

clean.notes: Subtle muted background. Standard Statistic styling.
